response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, including AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, but his background leans more toward general software development rather than specialized AI or cloud strategy. His entrepreneurial experience and open-source contributions are strong, but his lack of formal AI education or recognized AI expertise may limit his fit for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: 15+ years in software engineering with leadership roles at prominent companies (Naver, Tencent)
Strong entrepreneurial experience with open-source platform development (Geo-Data platform)
Diverse technical stack including AI-agent frameworks, cloud technologies, and full-stack development
concerns: Limited explicit AI expertise or recognized AI products/platforms built with AI
No advanced degrees in AI-related fields (only Bachelor's in Computer Science)
Current role at Naver focuses on engineering rather than strategic AI/cloud leadership

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and recognized AI products
Cloud and AI platform strategy experience
